# Publications

<p class="page-lead">
  Selected research across Earth observation, Earth system data cubes, vegetation dynamics,
  artificial intelligence, and open scientific software. The complete record is available on
  <a href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=-wTpOdsAAAAJ&hl=en">Google Scholar</a>.
</p>

<PublicationSearch lang="en" />
